answer:
The recurrence \( f(2N + 1) = f(2N) = f(N) + \log N \) suggests that \( f(N) \) grows roughly like the sum of \( \log k \) for all \( k \) in the binary representation of \( N \). This leads to a bound of \( O(N \log N) \), as the sum of \( \log k \) over all \( k \leq N \) is dominated by the largest terms.

\boxed{F}
